manipulators.description: Interceptor: Comma + Space -> Literal comma and space
Interceptor: Comma + Enter -> Literal comma and enter
Comma Hyper Trigger (Instant Hyper for other keys, Comma on tap/hold)
Trigger: Sets a 'pending' state immediately, activates Hyper after hold

rules.description: Rule 6: Navigation Row (1-0 and Escape remapped)
Rule 4: Left option to command and Right-Option to Shift+Control+Option (Meh Key)
Rule 5: Caps Lock to Control (Hold), Escape (Tap)
Change left shift to open paren on tap
Change right shift to open paren on tap
